VAL-RUNBOOK-001.evidence: 24/24 tests passed in tests/runbook/test_preflight_inventory.py. Tests cover: GPU UUID parsing (test_parses_gpu_uuids), NVLink topology/status (test_parses_nvlink_entries, test_captures_nvlink_topology), driver version (test_parses_driver_version, test_captures_driver_version), CUDA version (test_parses_cuda_version, test_captures_cuda_version), software versions including python/driver/cuda (test_captures_software_versions), OS/kernel (test_captures_os_kernel), CPU model (test_captures_cpu_model), ECC mode and error baselines (test_parses_ecc_mode, test_parses_ecc_errors, test_captures_ecc_baseline), GPU memory/temp/power metadata, per-GPU identity details (test_captures_gpu_details), and PreflightRunner section runner (completed status, timestamps, metrics, name). Source code (preflight.py) implements collect_preflight_inventory() which parses nvidia-smi -q output to capture all required fields. system.py provides supplementary environment probing.
VAL-RUNBOOK-001.details: All assertion requirements verified: GPU UUIDs captured via parse_nvidia_smi_q into gpu_inventory.gpu_uuids; NVLink topology extracted per-GPU with link_id/state/remote_gpu_uuid; driver_version and cuda_version parsed from nvidia-smi header; software_versions dict includes python/driver/cuda keys; OS and kernel from platform module; CPU model via platform-specific detection; ECC baseline captured per-GPU UUID with ecc_mode and error counts; NUMA nodes detected on Linux. Fixture-based testing validates all paths on non-GPU hosts.

VAL-RUNBOOK-002.evidence: 26/26 tests passed in tests/runbook/test_compute_matrix.py. Tests cover: mamf-finder parser for all dtypes (bf16, fp8_e4m3, fp8_e5m2, fp16), fixed-shape parsing, per-dtype runner with GPU isolation (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES set to gpu_index), required dtype coverage (test_covers_required_dtypes verifies REQUIRED_DTYPES=(bf16, fp8_e4m3, fp8_e5m2, fp16) are subset of dtypes_tested), per-GPU results (test_per_gpu_results_present, test_each_gpu_has_all_dtypes), fixed-shape checks (test_includes_fixed_shape_results with DEFAULT_FIXED_SHAPE=4096x4096x4096), per-GPU isolation evidence (test_per_gpu_isolation_evidence checks cuda_visible_devices field), TF32 optional behavior (excluded by default, included when include_tf32=True), and ComputeMatrixRunner section runner (completed status, timestamps, name, metrics). Source code (compute.py) implements run_mamf_for_dtype() with CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES env isolation per GPU.
VAL-RUNBOOK-002.details: All assertion requirements verified: REQUIRED_DTYPES tuple contains (bf16, fp8_e4m3, fp8_e5m2, fp16); TF32 is optional via OPTIONAL_DTYPES and include_tf32 flag; fixed-shape checks use DEFAULT_FIXED_SHAPE={m:4096,n:4096,k:4096}; per-GPU isolation implemented via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=str(gpu_index) in subprocess env; each GPU gets separate result entries in per_gpu dict; execution metadata includes gpu_index and cuda_visible_devices fields in every result.

VAL-RUNBOOK-003.evidence: 27/27 tests passed in tests/runbook/test_memory_matrix.py. Tests cover: nvbandwidth JSON parser for all test types, individual test runners (h2d, d2d_read, d2d_bidir, device_local_copy_sm), PyTorch D2D cross-validation (bandwidth_gb_s, size_bytes, iterations), and full matrix collection. REQUIRED_TESTS=(device_local_copy, device_local_copy_sm, h2d, d2h, d2d_read, d2d_write, d2d_bidir) verified via test_runs_all_required_tests. Individual presence tests verify each of the 7 required tests plus pytorch_d2d_crossval. Source code (memory.py) implements NVBW_TEST_MAP mapping short names to nvbandwidth test commands, run_nvbandwidth_test() for each test, and run_pytorch_d2d_crossval() for PyTorch D2D measurement.
VAL-RUNBOOK-003.details: All assertion requirements verified: REQUIRED_TESTS tuple matches all 7 required nvbandwidth tests (device_local_copy, device_local_copy_sm, h2d, d2h, d2d_read, d2d_write, d2d_bidir); each test has dedicated fixture data in tests/fixtures/nvbandwidth/; PyTorch D2D cross-validation implemented with 256MB tensor, 20 iterations, and CUDA event timing; collect_memory_matrix() returns tests_run list, nvbandwidth_results dict, and pytorch_d2d_crossval dict; MemoryMatrixRunner wraps this as a section with timestamps and status.

VAL-RUNBOOK-004.evidence: 29/29 tests passed in tests/runbook/test_interconnect_matrix.py. Tests cover: NCCL output parser for all test types (all_reduce_sweep, all_reduce_1gb, reduce_scatter, all_gather, broadcast, sendrecv), device info parsing (rank, gpu_name), data row parsing with out_of_place/in_place busbw fields, avg_bus_bandwidth and max_busbw computation, individual test runners, unknown test error handling, and full matrix collection. REQUIRED_NCCL_TESTS=(all_reduce_sweep, all_reduce_1gb, reduce_scatter, all_gather, broadcast, sendrecv) verified via test_runs_all_required_tests. Bus bandwidth summary verified (test_bus_bandwidth_summary_present checks avg_busbw and max_busbw for every required test). Source code (interconnect.py) implements NCCL_TEST_CONFIG with correct binary and argument mappings for each test type.
VAL-RUNBOOK-004.details: All assertion requirements verified: REQUIRED_NCCL_TESTS tuple covers all 6 required NCCL tests; NCCL_TEST_CONFIG maps each to correct binary (all_reduce_perf, reduce_scatter_perf, all_gather_perf, broadcast_perf, sendrecv_perf) with appropriate sweep arguments; all_reduce_1gb uses -b 1G -e 1G -n 100 for variance measurement; bus_bandwidth_summary aggregates avg_busbw and max_busbw per test; parser extracts device info, data rows with out_of_place/in_place bandwidth measurements, and summary statistics; InterconnectMatrixRunner wraps collection as a section with timestamps and status.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-RUNBOOK-001 (24 tests), VAL-RUNBOOK-002 (26 tests), VAL-RUNBOOK-003 (27 tests), VAL-RUNBOOK-004 (29 tests) — total 106 tests passing. Source code and test coverage verified for each assertion's required elements.
